case_title: SYSERCO, INC. VS HOPKINS HEATING & COOLING, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYSERCO, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOPKINS HEATING & COOLING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOPKINS HEATING & COOLING, INC.
